problem_statement: I want to learn whether solo founders understand a scheduling assistant concept and what would stop them from trying it.
target_market: Solo founders who manage sales calls and follow-up tasks themselves.
offered_solution: Decide whether to continue with this concept and what objections need human follow-up.
validation_goal: Decide whether to continue with this concept and what objections need human follow-up.
known_risks: Synthetic evidence requires human validation before market-proof claims.
